description: Perform a Regression Discontinuity Design (RDD) analysis to estimate the causal effect of winning a U.S. House election on the vote share in the subsequent election using the Lee (2008) dataset from the 'rdd' package. Conduct a McCrary density test to check for manipulation of the running variable and save the plot to /home/ga/RProjects/output/mccrary_test.png. Estimate the Local Average Treatment Effect (LATE) using a local linear regression with optimal bandwidth, saving the results with columns 'LATE', 'StdError', 'P_Value', and 'Bandwidth' to /home/ga/RProjects/output/rdd_results.csv. Generate a standard RDD plot showing binned means and the fitted regression discontinuity, saved to /home/ga/RProjects/output/rdd_plot.png. Write the complete analysis in /home/ga/RProjects/incumbency_rdd.R. Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123.
